meta.title: Shipping Price Calculator | Eagle Logistics Bangalore
meta.description: Compare sample DHL, FedEx and UPS shipping rates by weight and destination. Get Bangalore courier quotes from Eagle Logistics and confirm on WhatsApp.

content.title: Price Calculator
content.subtitle: Enter weight and destination to compare sample rates from DHL, FedEx, and UPS
content.notice: Sample rates from our rate card. Final price depends on zone, partner availability, and parcel type — confirm on WhatsApp for an exact quote.
content.offerReminder: Monsoon Express: mention EAGLE15 on WhatsApp for 15% off domestic shipping (T&C apply).
content.noMatchMessage: We couldn't find a rate for this weight and destination. WhatsApp us for a custom quote.
